sections.paragraph:
προφητικῶς adv. of προφητικός, prophetically εἰπεῖν speak prophetically (followed by direct discourse) MPol 12:3 (Ath. 10, 3 after direct discourse).

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 891
